summary: P4 Feature: Guest Search in Quick Reservation - All tests PASSED. Backend API (10/10) and Frontend UI fully verified.
feature_tested: Quick Reservation Guest Search - Search for existing guests by name/email/phone/id_number in the quick reservation dialog

tests: test_guest_search_response_fields - PASS (id, name, email, phone, id_number, vip_status, total_stays)

frontend.rooms_tab_loads: PASS - Room cards displayed with 'Rezervasyon Yap' buttons
frontend.guest_select: PASS - Selecting guest shows info in blue box
frontend.selected_guest_display: PASS - Shows name, email in blue box
frontend.clear_button: PASS - x button clears selection and returns to search mode
frontend.form_elements: PASS - check_in, check_out, total_amount, submit button all present

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/pms/guests/search?q=ali: Returns array of guests with id, name, email, phone, id_number, vip_status, total_stays

critical_code_review_comments: Guest search endpoint correctly registered before /pms/guests/{guest_id} in router
QuickBookingCreate model properly includes optional guest_id field
Frontend debounce (300ms) prevents excessive API calls
All interactive elements have appropriate data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing guests (Ali Veli, Ali Yilmaz)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 Guest Search feature fully implemented. Quick reservation dialog allows searching for existing guests by name/email/phone/id_number. Selecting a guest populates guest_id in the booking request. Clear button resets to search mode.
